calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Jaberll Davis, Assistant Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Billy Jones.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 20, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., and against defendant Billy Jones as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,797.00.
Holdover Damages - $608.21.
Costs - $215.00.
Total - $2,620.21.

Additionally, plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 459 Turk Street, #317, San Francisco, CA 94102. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Off Calendar
